Table	Create Table
liver_goals	CREATE TABLE `liver_goals` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `liverId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `year` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `month` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `salesGoal` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `streamCountGoal` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `streamHoursGoal` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `currentSales` bigint(20) DEFAULT '0',
  `currentStreamCount` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `currentStreamHours` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `salesGoalAchieved` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `streamCountGoalAchieved` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `streamHoursGoalAchieved` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `salesGoalAchievedAt` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_liver_year_month` (`liverId`,`year`,`month`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin
